title: InfamousCraft
description: Modpack that I created for me and my friends that I decided to make public for others to try out!
body:
InfamousCraft features 100+ Mods give you a brand new experience in Minecraft.

 

InfamousCraft is a pack that I have created for me and my friends server but I realized that I feel I should share this modpack with everyone! This modpack has many new cool ways to explore this brand new world I have created so I hope you enjoy!

 

Some of the features are:

 

⚔️VIC'S POINT BLANK
🌎NEW GENERATION WITH CONTINENTS

💿OPTIMIZATION AND SHADER SUPPORT

🏰PHILIP'S RUINS

⚙️ 100+ MODS FOR YOU TO EXPLORE!
